title: Please make all pop-up windows resizable - many are too small to utilize
excerpt: Nearly every pop-up window I’ve encountered has been too small for me. I would like the ability to stretch them to the size I need. This includes the formula builder, the automations window, and many more. Thank you!

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: Nearly every pop-up window I’ve encountered has been too small for me. I would like the ability to stretch them to the size I need. This includes the formula builder, the automations window, and many more. Thank you!

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be huge. It is way too difficult for me to see everything as I am working on my formulas!!!
